testsuite.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP

testcase.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP should check that pagination working correct for PLP
testcase.classname: should check that pagination working correct for PLP

testcase.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP should check that sorting by Price is working correct for PLP
testcase.classname: should check that sorting by Price is working correct for PLP

testcase.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP should check that sorting by Name is working correct for PLP
testcase.classname: should check that sorting by Name is working correct for PLP
